name: clooks-example-hooks
description: Example hooks demonstrating Clooks patterns: guards, logging, input rewriting, and multi-event observers.
author: joedegler

log-bash-commands.description: Logs every Bash command to .clooks/hook.log and allows it

no-compound-commands.description: Blocks compound bash commands (&&, ||, ;) unless prefixed with ALLOW_COMPOUND=true

no-bare-mv.description: Rewrites bare mv commands to git mv when git mv would succeed

debug-payload.description: Echoes hook payload into conversation context when CLOOKS_DEBUG=true

tmux-notifications.description: Visual tmux indicators: red for attention, flash for prompts, reset on activity
